sections.title: If the player has not received the temple coin

lines.speaker: Shaeded Beast
lines.text: No matter. This creature will soon be corrupted and then I will finally have a pawn of my own to manipulate in this world!

sections.title: If the player received the temple coin and the altar is cursed

lines.speaker: Shaeded Beast
lines.text: Insolent human! You have merely delayed my return to this world. I will find another puppet soon...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah Yeah, world domination, that's great and all but do you see that altar you cursed? Could you undo that? I'd like to use it for training down here.

lines.speaker: Shaeded Beast
lines.text: Ha!Ha!Ha! You are bold adventurer, but this altar will remain a lingering memento of your decision to challenge me!

sections.title: If the player removed the curse from the altar

lines.speaker: Shaeded Beast
lines.text: I am the void in the universe. I am the answer to all things that cry out for destruction. I am the destroyer of worlds. I am the darkness that swallows the light. Ally to...
